PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi t0,zero,20     00000001010000000000001010010011
0x0004		addi t1,zero,11     00000000101100000000001100010011
0x0008		addi t2,zero,1      00000000000100000000001110010011
0x000c		addi t3,zero,1      00000000000100000000111000010011
0x0010		bne t0,t1,update    00000000011000101001010001100011
0x0014		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
0x0018		sub t0,t0,t2        01000000011100101000001010110011
0x001c		addi t3,t3,1        00000000000111100000111000010011
0x0020		bne t0,t1,update    11111110011000101001110011100011
0x0024		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
